title: Harry Potter
questions: Are you into Harry Potter?
Do you think the Harry Potter series is a literary classic?
Have you read any of the Harry Potter books in English?
Are you surprised that the Harry Potter author J.K. Rowling is the highest-earning novelist in history?
What would you do if you were a witch or wizard?
Religious groups say the Harry Potter books are dangerous as they promote witchcraft among children. What do you think of this?
Do you think J.K. Rowling should write an eighth Potter book?
What impact has Potter made in your country?
The Harry Potter books took 17 years to write. Can you imagine spending so long on a creative project?
What questions would you like to ask J.K. Rowling, the Harry Potter creator?
Why do you think the Harry Potter books are so popular?
What do you know about the author of Harry Potter?
Which is better, the Harry potter books or the movies?
Have you ever been caught up in Pottermania?
Did you buy the Harry Potter books the day they went on sale?
Who is your favourite Harry Potter character?
What is the best book?
Would you like to study at Hogwart's School of Witchcraft and Wizardry?
Have you ever bought any Potter merchandise?
British Prime Minister Gordon Brown said, "I think JK Rowling has done more for literacy around the world than any single human being." What do you think of this?
